policy.description: Blocking line-coverage ratchets. Update measured counts in the same reviewed change whenever scope or coverage advances; never lower a floor without an explicit, justified scope change.

tolerance.rationale: Two clean local Node 22/V8 coverage runs on 2026-07-17 passed 1244 tests, and the final clean run passed 1249 tests; all three measured the identical complete 2253-line core scope at 1932 covered lines (85.752%). Issue #122's localized/late home-row regressions exercise existing navigation and action-sheet paths, advancing 17 covered lines over the reviewed 1915/2253 baseline without changing scope. The existing one-line tolerance is unchanged and permits only the previously reproduced negligible instrumentation variance; coverage-baseline.test.js retains exact below-floor, above-baseline, scope-change, and broad-tolerance negative boundaries.

Merge baseline for #157 landing on top of #98. Three consecutive clean local .NET 10.0.9/Coverlet integration runs on 2026-07-19 each passed all 1743 tests over the identical complete 27778-line assembly scope and measured 19446-19447 covered lines (70.009% high-water), the reviewed high-water. This combines two already-reviewed baseline advances on the 19150/27560 root: issue #98 (BI-PERF-037) grew the reviewed scope by 186 instrumented lines (Spoiler Guard tag projection N+1 removal — per-guid GetItemById memoization, batched played-state, per-revision season aggregates with targeted invalidation and fail-closed cancellation, byte-identical to the pure ResolveTagStripDecision), and issue #157 (BI-SRV-096) adds a further 32 instrumented lines (auto-movie/auto-season/watchlist monitors reconcile their event subscriptions on every ConfigurationChanged fan-out via SeerrIntegrationPolicy.InvalidateCachedActiveState + LiveNotifierService, PlaybackWatcherBase terminal disposed guard, and the new MonitorSubscriptionLifecycleTests driving hot-enable/hot-disable/idempotent/master-switch/disposal/unavailable-config paths). Both suites were adversarially reviewed on their own branches; the merged totals here are their scope union (27560 + 186 + 32 = 27778) with covered lines advancing to 19447 (CI high-water; local runs measured 19446, +1 Coverlet variance). The unchanged two-line low-side tolerance covers the reproduced ±1 Coverlet instrumentation variance; coverage-baseline.test.js retains the exact scope-drift, regression, stale-baseline, and broad-tolerance negative boundaries.
